nasb.text: for John baptized with water, but you will be baptized with the Holy Spirit not many days from now.”

esv.text: for John baptized with water, but you will be baptized with  the Holy Spirit not many days from now.”

cnv.text: 約翰是用水施洗，但再過幾天，你們要受聖靈的洗。”

ccb.text: 因为从前约翰用水给你们施洗，但再过几天，你们要受圣灵的洗。”

csbs.text: 因为约翰是用水施洗，但过不了多少日子，你们就要受圣灵的洗。”
